sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung Electronics part approval package for COVER-BATTERY_COVER, SEC Code MI63-02722A, supplied by DAEJIN INJECTION & MOLD / 대진아이엠㈜.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as DHF design-development output evidence for part approval, drawing/inspection results, process quality control, packing, molding conditions, and supplier inspection criteria.
keyPoints: Document Code and SEC Code are MI63-02722A for COVER-BATTERY_COVER.
Models listed are S4335-AW/AWV/AWM and S4343-AW.
Inspection requirements include appearance, CTF dimensions, mating/shape check, weight, and OK judgements.

The part must comply with substance thresholds specified in 0QA-2049.

The inspection criteria list weight as 33.2 g ±5%.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authorityOrJurisdiction uses the internal owner/proposal division from the document.
RoHS appears only as unchecked applied/not-applied boxes, so no RoHS applicability status is extracted.
Source is preprocessed spreadsheet text with many empty cells and repeated sections, which may reduce layout fidelity.
Multiple dates appear for different artifacts: E.D DATE 18-DEC-2018, inspection report date 2018-08-16, control plan original date 8/20/18, and work standard revision history 2017.12.26.
